epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical features with confirmatory genetic testing; structured multidisciplinary follow-up common

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: no screening (predictive testing is available with counseling)
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Not curable; multidisciplinary symptom management improves quality of life

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Broad access to genetic testing and counseling in many member states
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Multidisciplinary care, symptomatic treatment, rehabilitation, and palliative planning
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Long-term care needs and service variability across member states
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Established neurogenetics and multidisciplinary care pathways in many countries
